title: Fermented Pak Choi Soup
description: A light and refreshing Brazilian-inspired soup made with fermented ingredients and pak choi for a nutritious meal.
instructions: Heat the fermented light soup base in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the pak choi to the pot and cook until wilted.
Add the Brazilian chilies to the pot and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Season the soup with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the soup hot, garnished with chopped cilantro if desired.
